untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Exact Ascending/Descending Triangle formation) cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. Requires candlestick pattern recognition, support zone identification, and stall point detection. Author also marked key parameters (success_rate_bull, volume_trend, throwback_pullback_pct, exact_support_placement, expected_stall_target) as AUTHOR_SILENT, preventing precise rule construction.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using trend reversal signals (price below SMA_20 + strong ADX indicating potential breakout) and pivot-based exit at S1 support level. However, the core pattern logic (triangle formation geometry, specific support zones, stall behavior) requires pattern recognition unavailable in the allowed indicator set. The 72% success rate in bear markets and 7% failure rate at 5% threshold suggest this is a high-probability pattern when properly identified, but identification itself is untranslatable to this rule format.
